top_signals.title: Warsh Is Inheriting a Rates-Mountain Breakdown
top_signals.summary: We’re going from a steady descent on interest rates to a potentially wild ride.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Social Security COLA for 2027 may jump to 4.7%, one estimate finds. This chart shows prices driving the increase
top_signals.summary: As inflation climbs, Social Security beneficiaries may see a higher cost-of-living adjustment in 2027. Here's which costs spiked most over the past 12 months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
